name: zvamz

metadata.name: zvamz
metadata.summary: Codes used for Amazon seller report cleaning and API pulls.

documentation:
# ZVAMZ

Codes used for Amazon seller report cleaning and API pulls.

methods.name: zvamz.ratelimit.RateLimiter.refill
documentation: Refill tokens according to elapsed time.

methods.name: zvamz.ratelimit.RateLimiter.allow_request
documentation: Allow or deny a request based on available tokens.

methods.name: zvamz.ratelimit.RateLimiter.send_request
documentation: Send a request, handling throttling.

functions.name: zvamz.reports.bgdeldup
documentation:
Delete the data from the declared minDate to avoid duplicate in the database

Parameters:
- dateName: the name of the date column
- minDate: the start date that will be deleted to avoid duplicate
- client: the BigQuery client name
- bgTable: the BigQuery Table address

Returns:
- delete the data to avoid duplicate

functions.name: zvamz.reports.bgdeldupf
documentation:
Delete the data from the declared minDate to avoid duplicate in the database
(free version of BigQuery)

Parameters:
- dateName: the name of the date column
- minDate: the start date that will be deleted to avoid duplicate
- client: the BigQuery client name
- bgTable: the BigQuery Table address

Returns:
- delete the data to avoid duplicate

functions.name: zvamz.reports.dfbgcolcheck
documentation:
This function compares the columns of DataFrame and existing BigQuery Table

Paremeters:
- df: Data frame to check
- client: name of BigQuery client
- bgTable: the address of BigQuery Table

Returns:
- True if it matches
- ValueError if not

functions.name: zvamz.reports.lowfeereport
documentation:
This function process and clean the Amazon Economics Report.
It extracts the low level inventory data

Paremeters:
- filePath: the path where the report is saved

Returns:
- DataFrame of the cleaned report
- Flase if there is no data related to low level inventory fee

functions.name: zvamz.reports.promoreport
documentation:
Clean the raw file downloaded in Amazon Seller Central Promotions Report

Parameter:
- filePath: the path where the downloaded Promotions Report is located

Return:
- DataFrame of the cleaned report

functions.name: zvamz.api.zv_client_access
documentation:
This is authentication process for amazon.
Only works for ZV Data Automation Clients

functions.name: zvamz.api.shipment_status
documentation:
This will pull all shipment and its status for specified marketplace

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- past_days: number of days from today's date (UTC)

return:
- data frame of the list of shipments and its status

functions.name: zvamz.api.shipment_items
documentation:
This will pull all shipment and items inside it for specified marketplace.
Together with the quantity shipped vs received

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- past_days: number of days from today's date (UTC)

return:
- data frame of the list of shipments and items inside it

functions.name: zvamz.api.shipment_summary
documentation:
This will pull all shipment and items inside it for specified marketplace.
And Summarise the Report

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- past_days: number of days from today's date (UTC)

return:
- data frame of the report summary

functions.name: zvamz.api.narf_eligibility
documentation:
This will pull the report for NARF eligibility of the SKUs

Parameter:
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- file_path_name: the file path where to save the report up to its file name

return:
- data frame of the NARF Eligibility report

functions.name: zvamz.api.fba_inventory
documentation:
This will pull all FBA Inventory Report for the sepcified marketplaces

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- file_path: the specific file path where to save the raw report Example: '/content'
- marketplace_ids: lists of marketplace ids

return:
- data frame of FBA Inventory Report for all marketplaces

functions.name: zvamz.api.all_orders
documentation:
This will pull all orders report per region.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- file_path_name: the file path where to save the report up to its file name
- past_days: number of days from today's date (UTC)

return:
- data frame of all orders report

functions.name: zvamz.api.reimbursement_report
documentation:
This will pull reimbursement report per region.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- file_path_name: the file path where to save the report up to its file name
- past_days: number of days from today's date (UTC)

return:
- data frame of reimbursement report

functions.name: zvamz.api.inv_ledger
documentation:
This will pull inventory ledger report.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- file_path_name: the file path where to save the report up to its file name
- past_days: number of days from today's date (UTC)

return:
- data frame of inventory ledger report

functions.name: zvamz.api.customer_return
documentation:
This will pull customer return report.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- file_path_name: the file path where to save the report up to its file name
- past_days: number of days from today's date (UTC)

return:
- data frame of customer return report

functions.name: zvamz.api.replacements
documentation:
This will pull replacement report.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- file_path_name: the file path where to save the report up to its file name
- past_days: number of days from today's date (UTC)

return:
- data frame of replacement report

functions.name: zvamz.api.offers
documentation:
This will pull offer details for each ASIN in the list.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- asin_list: list of all ASIN, should be in form of list

return:
- data frame of offer details of each ASIN

functions.name: zvamz.api.ss_forecast
documentation:
This will pull S&S Forecast report.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- file_path_name: the file path where to save the report up to its file name
- past_days: number of days from today's date (UTC)

return:
- data frame of S&S Forecast report

functions.name: zvamz.api.ss_performance
documentation:
This will pull S&S Performance report.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- file_path_name: the file path where to save the report up to its file name
- past_days: number of days from today's date (UTC)

return:
- data frame of S&S Performance report

functions.name: zvamz.api.finance_shipmentEventList
documentation:
This will pull Shipment Event List in a region.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- past_days: number of days from today's date (UTC)

return:
- data frame of the report summary

functions.name: zvamz.api.fba_inv_live
documentation:
This will pull Live Inventory in specific Marketplace.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace

return:
- data frame of the Live Inventory Count

functions.name: zvamz.api.sku_attributes
documentation:
This will pull SKU attributes in specific Marketplace.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- sellerId: the Seller ID of specific region
- sku_list: list of all the SKUs to pull the attribute details

return:
- data frame of the attributes of all the SKU in the list

functions.name: zvamz.api.get_sellerId
documentation:
This will pull SKU attributes in specific Marketplace.

Parameter:
- marketplace_action: the specific marketplace command to pull the data
- access_token: matching access token of the marketplace
- sku: sample SKU that is active in the specific region

return:
- returns the Seller ID in a specific region
